entry.long: Buy if IV spikes and next-day price moves up >= 1.5%
entry.short: Short if IV spikes and next-day price moves down >= 1.5%

exit.stop_loss: Close position if price retraces 1% against position

trigger.description: Identify stocks where the implied volatility percentile (30-day) jumps above 80% compared to previous day with at least 15% IV increase. On following trading day, if price moves at least 1.5% in direction of IV spike, trigger entry.

position_sizing.description: Allocate 2% of portfolio capital per position to limit risk from volatility whipsaws
